headline: Warner Bros Stock Hits  3-Month Low. The Paramount Merger Spread Is Too Good to Pass Up.
summary: The stock now offers a 17% return to the deal price. That’s a really wide spread for a takeover deal, considering the target closing date.

raw.headline: Warner Bros Stock Hits  3-Month Low. The Paramount Merger Spread Is Too Good to Pass Up.
raw.summary: The stock now offers a 17% return to the deal price. That’s a really wide spread for a takeover deal, considering the target closing date.

headline: Paramount accuses Netflix of ‘scorched-earth’ campaign against Warner Bros. deal
summary: Paramount accused Netflix of launching a “scorched-earth campaign to try and poison regulators and other stakeholders” against its purchase of Warner Bros.

raw.headline: Paramount accuses Netflix of ‘scorched-earth’ campaign against Warner Bros. deal
raw.summary: Paramount accused Netflix of launching a “scorched-earth campaign to try and poison regulators and other stakeholders” against its purchase of Warner Bros.

headline: Paramount’s $110bn Hollywood takeover to be investigated by UK
summary: Britain’s competition watchdog has kicked off an investigation into Paramount’s $110bn (£82bn) takeover of Warner Bros.

raw.headline: Paramount’s $110bn Hollywood takeover to be investigated by UK
raw.summary: Britain’s competition watchdog has kicked off an investigation into Paramount’s $110bn (£82bn) takeover of Warner Bros.

headline: Paramount Accuses Netflix Of Waging 'Scorched-Earth Campaign' To Derail Warner Bros. Discovery Deal: Report
summary: Paramount accused Netflix of a "scorched-earth campaign" to derail its $111 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery.

raw.headline: Paramount Accuses Netflix Of Waging 'Scorched-Earth Campaign' To Derail Warner Bros. Discovery Deal: Report
